---
title: "How prevalent is \"other ethnicity blindness\"? Exploring the extremes of recognition performance across categories of faces"
authors: "Tree, J. J., & Jones, A. L."
year: 2025
date: 2025-01-01
pub-journal: "Journal of Experimental Psychology: General"
doi: "10.1037/xge0001730"
pdf: "assets/papers/2025/tree&jones2025.pdf"
categories: [face-perception]
---
